rules.headings: Tracking-tight, high-weight for top-level metrics. Left-aligned.
rules.overlines: Uppercase, tiny text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] for status labels and form groups.

colors.strategy: Functional High-Contrast. Color is used strictly for status and action, not decoration.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Dense and scanable. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for KPI metrics. gap-4 or gap-6 for tight widget spacing.

structure.sidebar: Dark mode sidebar (#09090B) to anchor the application. Contains main navigation routes.
structure.topbar: Sticky white topbar featuring a prominent global search input (for IMEI, Ticket #, Customer) and User Profile.
structure.main_canvas: Light grey (#F4F4F5) background with stark white cards.

components.strategy: Flat, sharp borders, highly data-dense. Avoid heavy shadows; rely on 1px borders.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-300 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-100

tables.style: Shadcn Table. Crisp borders between rows. Dense padding (py-2) to fit more data (IMEIs, serial numbers) on screen without scrolling.

forms.inputs: Shadcn input/select. bg-white border-zinc-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500. Labels must be text-sm font-medium text-zinc-900.

badges.style: Used extensively for 'Repair Status'. Soft background with dark text of the same hue (e.g., bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border border-emerald-200).

media_and_images.rules: Use images sparingly in the dashboard. Use them for empty states, login screens, or generic part placeholders.

image_urls.description: Technician repairing a smartphone under a desk lamp. Use as the left/right split background for the Login/Auth screen with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60).
Exploded view of smartphone hardware parts. Use as an opaque, stylized background or empty state illustration in the Inventory section.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2. Clean, unopinionated icons.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons, table rows, and interactive cards must have an explicit hover state (background color shift).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
interactions_and_motion.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for Quick Actions (e.g., 'Update Status', 'Add Note'). Ensure backdrop blur is present.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast. Never use text lighter than text-zinc-500 on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All buttons, links, form inputs, menus, and table actions MUST include `data-testid` in kebab-case. Example: `data-testid='search-imei-input'`, `data-testid='add-repair-button'`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust Dashboard layout using the 'Dark Sidebar / Light Workspace' pattern.
The primary action should always be accessible: a global 'New Repair Ticket' button in the header or sidebar.
Implement Shadcn Data Tables for the 'Repairs', 'Customers', and 'Inventory' views with built-in pagination and filtering.
Forms for device registration must be structured cleanly with clear sections: Device Info, Customer Info, Diagnostic Notes.
Include an overarching Dashboard view with Recharts (Bar chart for weekly repairs, Pie chart for status distribution).
Strictly follow the color mappings for repair status to give users instant visual context on the state of the shop.
Do not invent colors outside of this Swiss High-Contrast spec. Ensure the UI feels like a professional, high-density work tool.
